briefs.title: BC Gaming Facilities Must Meet New Security and Surveillance Rules by April 2026
briefs.summary: A new Security and Surveillance Regulation under BC's Gaming Control Act takes effect April 13, 2026, setting formal rules for access control, cash handling, and surveillance at provincial gaming facilities.
briefs.action_required: Review the new Security and Surveillance Regulation and update your facility's access, cash-handling, and surveillance procedures before April 13, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Gaming Security and Surveillance Regulation takes effect
